rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; type annexes for component-level assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings
Use implementation scope for assign statements targeting output features or declared auxiliary variables only
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts reference only visible ports and features in their respective scopes
Do not include implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Validate that all referenced identifiers exist in the AADL model before inserting AGREE annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Guarantee statements in implementation scope should relate visible outputs to visible inputs
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation-level annexes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables
